## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Bubble and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, keyword research, and content generation workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/NcVfJWRcht8hoJYAvFx2h7XK74QaBm7P?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX presented 60+ blog ideas for approval in Airtable, covering various topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/NcVfJWRcht8hoJYAvFx2h7XK74QaBm7P?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
  - [Atlas content generation platform workflow explained, including AI-assisted drafting and human editing](https://fathom.video/share/NcVfJWRcht8hoJYAvFx2h7XK74QaBm7P?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Bubble to provide updated positioning guide and brand assets for more accurate content creation](https://fathom.video/share/NcVfJWRcht8hoJYAvFx2h7XK74QaBm7P?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
  - [Next steps: Bubble to review content suggestions, GrowthX to generate a sample blog post for feedback](https://fathom.video/share/NcVfJWRcht8hoJYAvFx2h7XK74QaBm7P?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Keyword Research

  - [60+ blog ideas compiled in Airtable for Bubble's approval](https://fathom.video/share/NcVfJWRcht8hoJYAvFx2h7XK74QaBm7P?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
  - [Ideas cover multiple topic clusters with balance across each](https://fathom.video/share/NcVfJWRcht8hoJYAvFx2h7XK74QaBm7P?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [Keyword research factoring in content refreshes and traffic loss](https://fathom.video/share/NcVfJWRcht8hoJYAvFx2h7XK74QaBm7P?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Combining data from Google Search Console, SEMrush, and Bubble's internal metrics](https://fathom.video/share/NcVfJWRcht8hoJYAvFx2h7XK74QaBm7P?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)

### Content Calendar and Workflow

  - [Airtable used as main source of truth for content creation and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/NcVfJWRcht8hoJYAvFx2h7XK74QaBm7P?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Three client views: ideas for approval, content ready for review, and published content](https://fathom.video/share/NcVfJWRcht8hoJYAvFx2h7XK74QaBm7P?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [Approval process: checkbox for topic approval, comments for feedback](https://fathom.video/share/NcVfJWRcht8hoJYAvFx2h7XK74QaBm7P?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [Content generation workflow in Atlas platform:](https://fathom.video/share/NcVfJWRcht8hoJYAvFx2h7XK74QaBm7P?tab=summary&timestamp=890.0)
    1.  Assignment direction and outline
    2.  SEO data analysis and keyword opportunities
    3.  Research compilation
    4.  Outline refinement
    5.  Content drafting with fact-checking and internal linking
    6.  Multiple rounds of human editing before client review

### Brand Positioning and Imagery

  - [Need to update artifacts with Bubble's new positioning, especially regarding AI focus](https://fathom.video/share/NcVfJWRcht8hoJYAvFx2h7XK74QaBm7P?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
  - [GrowthX designer to create featured images based on Bubble's visual assets](https://fathom.video/share/NcVfJWRcht8hoJYAvFx2h7XK74QaBm7P?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
  - [Bubble's brand design team to approve imagery](https://fathom.video/share/NcVfJWRcht8hoJYAvFx2h7XK74QaBm7P?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
  - [Schedule touch base between GrowthX and Bubble design teams next week](https://fathom.video/share/NcVfJWRcht8hoJYAvFx2h7XK74QaBm7P?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)

### Content Management and Interlinking

  - [GrowthX to handle CMS staging and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/NcVfJWRcht8hoJYAvFx2h7XK74QaBm7P?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)
  - [Discussion on internal linking strategy for new and existing content](https://fathom.video/share/NcVfJWRcht8hoJYAvFx2h7XK74QaBm7P?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [Potential for providing suggestions for updating links in older content](https://fathom.video/share/NcVfJWRcht8hoJYAvFx2h7XK74QaBm7P?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)

### SEO Tracking and Reporting

  - [GrowthX updating list of queries to track in Scrunch](https://fathom.video/share/NcVfJWRcht8hoJYAvFx2h7XK74QaBm7P?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)
  - [Adding tags for no-code and AI app development to differentiate visibility](https://fathom.video/share/NcVfJWRcht8hoJYAvFx2h7XK74QaBm7P?tab=summary&timestamp=1679.0)
  - [Bubble team interested in access to Scrunch data (currently restricted to GrowthX emails)](https://fathom.video/share/NcVfJWRcht8hoJYAvFx2h7XK74QaBm7P?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bubble to review and provide feedback on content suggestions in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/NcVfJWRcht8hoJYAvFx2h7XK74QaBm7P?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Eunice to compile and share internal data on blog lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/NcVfJWRcht8hoJYAvFx2h7XK74QaBm7P?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Deedi to share updated Google Doc version of positioning guide](https://fathom.video/share/NcVfJWRcht8hoJYAvFx2h7XK74QaBm7P?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
  - [GrowthX to generate a sample blog post for Bubble's review (focus on voice, tone, and content)](https://fathom.video/share/NcVfJWRcht8hoJYAvFx2h7XK74QaBm7P?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)
  - [Schedule meeting between GrowthX and Bubble design teams for imagery guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/NcVfJWRcht8hoJYAvFx2h7XK74QaBm7P?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
  - [Erik to ensure Katya (GrowthX designer) has access to Bubble's Figma file](https://fathom.video/share/NcVfJWRcht8hoJYAvFx2h7XK74QaBm7P?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)
  - [GrowthX to update SEO tracking with new prompts and competitor set](https://fathom.video/share/NcVfJWRcht8hoJYAvFx2h7XK74QaBm7P?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)
